---
title: "Large Scale Crowdsourcing and Characterization of Twitter Abusive Behavior"
author: "Founta, A., Djouvas, C., Chatzakou, D., Leontiadis, I., Blackburn, J., Stringhini, G., Vakali, A., Sirivianos, M., and Kourtellis, N."
date: 2018-01-01
description: "International AAAI Conference on Web and Social Media (ICWSM 2018)"
categories: [Media and Social Media Monitoring]
image: images_publications/conference.png
---
